goals.name: Portfolio — Adrian's level
goals.notes: 5 year goal. Match Adrian (Passive Income Investing) at $2.5M portfolio generating $47K/month. Requires EP8 profit deployment, consistent $8K/month holdco contributions, and DRIP compounding.

goals.name: Holdco passive income ceiling $50K
goals.notes: NEVER exceed $50K passive income in holdco annually — triggers loss of small business deduction on EP8 active income. Kit tracks quarterly in QBO. Rule: Under $40K = full deployment. $40-48K = pause HBTE and QQCL. $48K+ = CSU and VTV only.

goals.name: Deploy $23K RRSP sniper bullet
goals.notes: Hold as cash in RRSP. Deploy into CLSA when price drops to $12-13 and NAV discount widens to 7%+. Do not deploy at current prices.

goals.name: Deploy $43K Kit RRSP incoming
goals.notes: Split between HBTE (Bitcoin ecosystem income), CLSA on dip, and VTV DCA continuation.

keyRules: DRIP always on — never turn off any position
CLSA NAV check — visit bromptongroup.com monthly, deploy on 7%+ discount
BTC hold — do not sell until ~$116,309 CAD breakeven
MSTY/MSTE — hold long, review only if monthly income drops below $1K or price below $10
BIGY — sell, redeploy to CLSA RRSP
Holdco passive income — Kit tracks quarterly in QBO, never exceed $50K
EP8 profits = primary wealth building engine — maximize and funnel to holdco consistently
$23K RRSP room = sniper bullet for CLSA dip, hold as cash until opportunity
